name: Niacinamide
description: A versatile form of vitamin B3 that supports the skin barrier.
scientificSummary: Boosts keratin and ceramide production, acting as a powerful anti-inflammatory and barrier-strengthening agent.
mechanismOfAction: Boosts keratin and ceramide production, acting as a powerful anti-inflammatory and barrier-strengthening agent.
